# Hardware Selection (/installation/checklists/hardware-selection)



> RustFS is designed for efficiency with a low memory footprint.

## Test Environment [#test-environment]

> Minimal requirements for testing:

| Component      | Requirement           |
| -------------- | --------------------- |
| CPU            | 1 core+               |
| Architecture   | x86, ARM              |
| Memory         | 1 GB+                 |
| Storage        | HDD or SSD            |
| Docker         | Supported             |
| Network        | Local or Offline      |
| OS             | Windows, Linux, macOS |
| Load Balancing | None                  |
| Nodes          | 1                     |

## Production Environment [#production-environment]

| Component      | Requirement         |
| -------------- | ------------------- |
| CPU            | 2 x 12 cores+       |
| Architecture   | x86, ARM, etc.      |
| Memory         | 64 GB+              |
| Storage        | SSD recommended     |
| Network        | 10 Gbps+            |
| OS             | Linux (Recommended) |
| Load Balancing | Recommended         |
| Nodes          | 4+                  |

## Expert Services [#expert-services]

For complex deployments, contact support at [hello@rustfs.com](mailto:hello@rustfs.com).
